intro: The cryptocurrency sector faced a concentrated wave of attacks in mid-April 2026, with 11 high and critical severity incidents reported. The campaigns primarily targeted organizations in North America, Europe, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Kyrgyzstan, also impacting financial-services and telecommunications. The distinct threat actors FakeWallet and Omnistealer were active, exploiting vulnerabilities including the critical CVE-2023-4863. This series of incidents underscores the persistent and focused threats facing digital asset platforms and their interconnected service providers across key global regions.
